epics.title: Profile Management
epics.outcome: Researchers can define, edit, and maintain multiple topic profiles without writing code.

success_metrics.name: Profile creation time
success_metrics.target: Researchers can create a new profile in less than 2 minutes

success_metrics.name: Profile editing time
success_metrics.target: Researchers can edit an existing profile in less than 1 minute

architectural_impact.description: Add profile creation and editing UI components

epics.title: PubMed Data Fetching and Processing
epics.outcome: System reliably fetches PubMed data and processes it for relevance scoring.

success_metrics.name: Data fetching reliability
success_metrics.target: 99% success rate for PubMed data fetching per week

architectural_impact.description: Implement PubMed data fetcher with rate limit handling
Add local caching for fetched results
Add paper processing pipeline with caching

epics.title: Relevance Scoring
epics.outcome: System scores papers for relevance to each profile using keyword-based and user feedback mechanisms.

success_metrics.name: Scoring accuracy
success_metrics.target: At least 80% of top 10 papers are relevant to the user's profile

success_metrics.name: User feedback incorporation
success_metrics.target: At least 90% of user feedback is incorporated within 24 hours of submission

architectural_impact.description: Enhance relevance scoring algorithm to support keyword weights and feedback
Add UI for marking papers as relevant/not relevant

epics.title: Digest Generation and Delivery
epics.outcome: System generates and delivers a weekly digest with the top 10 most relevant papers per profile.

success_metrics.name: Digest frequency
success_metrics.target: Digests are generated and sent weekly on time

success_metrics.name: Digest delivery time
success_metrics.target: Digests arrive within 6 hours of scheduled time

architectural_impact.description: Implement email delivery system for digests

epics.title: Adoption and Feedback Collection
epics.outcome: Researchers adopt the tool and provide feedback for continuous improvement.

success_metrics.name: User adoption rate
success_metrics.target: Tool is used weekly by at least 3 researchers in the lab within 1 month of release

success_metrics.name: User feedback rate
success_metrics.target: At least 70% of active users provide feedback within 2 weeks of adoption

architectural_impact.description: Add feedback collection system with analytics dashboard
